parameters.title: Filter spectral data with a single filter
parameters.label: Filter spectral data with a single filter: Available filter: moving-average, gauss, savitzky-golay and LOWESS.

parameter.hint: The root fp of the project
The dataframe to use as input, raw = original spectra, previous = the latest saved parquet file(s), or state the name of the parquet file with spectra derived from earlier step(s) to use as input.

The filter to apply, if set to none, no filter will be applied even if the process is called. You have to define the filter to apply and set the relative or absolute path to the filter.JSON file as the parameter.
Name of the matplotlib colormap to use
